disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Sudden-onset profuse watery diarrhoea and forceful vomiting since this morning, with inability to keep any fluid down
trigger_question_examples: Have you been able to keep any fluids down?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Since this morning it's been pouring out of both ends — watery diarrhoea every few minutes and I keep being sick, so I can't keep even a sip of water down.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Near-fainting and the room going black on standing (postural light-headedness / presyncope)
trigger_question_examples: Do you feel dizzy or faint, especially when you stand?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Every time I try to stand the room goes black and I feel like I'm going to faint — that's why I can't get to the bathroom on my own.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Ate takeaway chicken about 24 hours before symptoms began
trigger_question_examples: Have you eaten anything unusual or takeaway recently?
Has anyone else who shared the food been unwell?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I had takeaway chicken yesterday, about a day before this all kicked off.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Diffuse crampy abdominal pain that is generalised and not localised to one area
trigger_question_examples: Is the pain worse in one particular spot?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's crampy all over my belly, comes and goes before I go to the toilet — it's not stuck in one place.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Subjective fever, generalised muscle aches and feeling washed out
trigger_question_examples: Do you feel feverish or achy?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I feel hot and shivery and ache all over — my home thermometer read 38.2.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No blood, and no black or tarry material, seen in the stool or vomit so far
trigger_question_examples: Have you noticed any blood in the toilet, or black tarry stools?
Have you vomited anything that looks like blood or coffee grounds?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I haven't seen any blood or anything black — it's just watery.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Bedbound and dependent on partner to reach the bathroom, with a high risk of falling
trigger_question_examples: Are you able to move around safely?
Can you get to the bathroom on your own?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I can't get up on my own — I'm too weak and dizzy, my partner has to help me or I'd go over.
